title: Sirty
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Sirty
CT-36/732 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Sirty''', designated '''CT-36/732''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commando]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Ord Cestus Squad]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a logistics expert. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Sirty took part in a demonstration of a [[JK-13|JK]] [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] at the [[T'Chuk Sporting Arena|T'Chuk Colliseum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was quickly defeated by the JK in under forty-two seconds. Because of this brief encounter with the bio-droid, [[Jangotat|Nate]] recruited him as a fellow squad member on a [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to destroy the JK droids' manufacturing plants on Ord Cestus. ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-36/732 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
